## Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature or improvement is.

## Why is this needed?
Explain why this would be useful for Chrome extension developers.

## Suggested Content
If proposing new documentation, describe what topics should be covered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or examples about the feature request here.
